description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:git image with a docker:dind service and DOCKER_DRIVER set to overlay. Define three stages: test, release_base, and release_other. Add a test job in the test stage that runs echo 'Pending!'. Add release 2.1 and release 2.3 jobs in the release_base stage that run only on the master branch, with a before_script that extracts RUBY_VERSION from CI_BUILD_NAME, sets IMAGE_DIR to base, copies base/Dockerfile.template to base/Dockerfile, replaces the ruby version placeholder, and a script that logs in to the registry, builds a Docker image tagged $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$RUBY_VERSION from the base Dockerfile, and pushes it. Add release 2.1 firefox, release 2.1 google-chrome, and release 2.3 google-chrome jobs in the release_other stage that also run only on master, with a before_script that extracts RUBY_VERSION and EXTENDED_NAME from CI_BUILD_NAME, sets IMAGE_DIR to the extended name, defines BASE_IMAGE_NAME and IMAGE_NAME, copies the corresponding Dockerfile.template, replaces the base_image_name placeholder, and a script that logs in, builds the image tagged $BASE_IMAGE_NAME-$EXTENDED_NAME, and pushes it.
